design_system_issues.summary: Confirm migrated toolbar actions map to source-backed Salt components before implementation.

runtime_issues.summary: The live fixture exposes a loading state that must remain visible in the migration plan.

missing_evidence.next_action: Run the local app, component preview, accessibility check, or a repo-provided check outside Salt and attach the result before marking runtime validation complete.

repair_loop.next_action: Feed the runtime finding back into the Salt review or migration workflow after the host captures runtime evidence.
